title: Migrating EKS from Fargate to EC2 Node Groups: A 4-Phase Approach
excerpt: Why Fargate wasn't enough for our production workloads, and how we planned a safe, zero-downtime migration with security group considerations for RDS, ElastiCache, and MSK.

title: Building Multi-Account AWS Cost Reports with Python & ReportLab
excerpt: How I automated PDF cost reports for production and dev AWS accounts — covering EKS optimization events, partial-month highlighting, and corporate brand theming.

title: Graviton Migration on EKS & RDS: What You Actually Save
excerpt: A breakdown of our Graviton evaluation: ~10% RDS savings, ~40% EC2 price-performance gains, and how to use Compute Optimizer + Karpenter to automate node pool selection.

title: Terraform -target: When to Use It (and When to Run Away)
excerpt: Real-world cases where -target saved production deploys — OIDC providers vs Route53 records — and the pitfalls of partial state drifts that haunt you later.

title: Kubernetes RCA Practice: Sidecar CPU Spike & Liveness Probe Loop
excerpt: A war-room style post-mortem on a simulated flash sale outage — sidecar CPU exhaustion triggering liveness probe failures and cascading pod restarts under load.

title: Pop!_OS + Windows Dual Boot on ASUS ROG Zephyrus G14
excerpt: Step-by-step: custom EFI partition, systemd-boot with Windows default, and compiling asusctl/supergfxctl from source to get the RTX 4060 hybrid graphics working properly.
